# Goodie Goodie Food

Goodie Goodie Food is a premium dessert truck and catering service based in Lewiston, Maine. We provide artisan desserts for events, including chocolate-dipped strawberries, mini pancakes, and crafted drinks.

## Core Offerings
- Chocolate Strawberries: Hand-dipped in milk, dark, or white chocolate with premium toppings.
- Mini Pancakes: Fluffy, bite-sized pancakes cooked fresh with sweet drizzles and fruits.
- Crafted Drinks: Signature lemonades and hot chocolate.

## Service Details
- Location: Serving Lewiston, Maine and surrounding areas.
- Event Types: Birthdays, weddings, corporate events, festivals, graduations, baby showers.
- Booking: Full-service truck catering available. Fill out the booking form on our website for a custom quote.

## Contact
- Email: ggoodiefood@gmail.com
- Social: @goodiegoodiefood
- Website: https://a7ussein.github.io/GoodieGoodieFood/

## Developer Notes
Crafted by Automyte (https://automyte.dev/).
This is a static website utilizing HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript. Form submissions are handled securely via Formspree.
